tasks.title: Scaffold
tasks.description: Create repo, copy shared foundation from client-site-template, scaffold all routes as stubs with metadata exports.
tasks.details: Foundation work: repository layout, shared patterns from client-site-template, all marketing routes present as stubs with metadata exports per PRD routes list.
tasks.testStrategy: npm test passes, npm run dev starts, dark page loads.

tasks.title: Floating Navbar
tasks.description: Build the Floating Navbar using Aceternity's Floating Navbar, wrapped and wired to navigation config.
tasks.details: Implement in src/components/aceternity/FloatingNavbar.tsx, consume from src/components/layout/Navbar.tsx. Items from src/config/navigation.ts. CTA uses buttonVariants() on Link. Include dark/light mode toggle and mobile menu.
tasks.testStrategy: Navbar visible on all routes, theme toggle works, mobile responsive.

tasks.title: Hero Section
tasks.description: Build the Hero with Lamp, Spotlight New, Text Generate Effect, Aurora, Typewriter, Moving Border CTAs — all wrapped Aceternity, content from home.ts.
tasks.details: All Aceternity components wrapped under src/components/aceternity/. Content from src/content/home.ts hero object. Respect locked headline, typewriter sub, and primary/secondary CTAs.
tasks.testStrategy: Animations play on load, headline matches locked copy, both CTAs present.

tasks.title: About Section
tasks.description: Build About using Bento Grid and Tracing Beam; content from home.ts about object.
tasks.details: Layout with Bento Grid; Tracing Beam as scroll reveal wrapper. Pull all copy from src/content/home.ts about object.
tasks.testStrategy: Section renders, tracing beam animates on scroll.

tasks.title: Templates Gallery
tasks.description: Build /templates gallery with Focus Cards and vertical tabs (medspa/dental/agency) from templates.ts.
tasks.details: Use Focus Cards as primary; Tabs for vertical filter. Data from src/content/templates.ts (9 templates). Placeholder images until static assets are added.
tasks.testStrategy: All 9 templates shown, tab filter works, Focus Cards animate.

tasks.title: For Agencies Page
tasks.description: Build /for-agencies with Compare, Sticky Scroll Reveal, Wobble Card; pitch agency white-label model.
tasks.details: Compare: average site vs Parker Thomas quality. Sticky Scroll for value props. Wobble Card for contact/partner CTA. Marketing copy from content modules, not hardcoded in page shell.
tasks.testStrategy: Page renders, Compare interactive, Sticky Scroll animates.

tasks.title: Wire Content, OG, Sitemap, Robots
tasks.description: Metadata, OG image route, sitemap, and robots.txt across all routes.
tasks.details: Every route has proper metadata exports. OG image route at /og with site identity from src/config/site.ts. Sitemap and robots.txt correct for production.
tasks.testStrategy: Meta tags present on key pages, sitemap.xml accessible, /og returns 1200x630 image.

tasks.title: Deploy to Vercel
tasks.description: Vercel project parker-thomas, GitHub repo parkerjthomas/parker-thomas, RESEND_API_KEY, confirm dark default.
tasks.details: Create/link Vercel project, connect repo, set RESEND_API_KEY, verify production build and default theme.
tasks.testStrategy: Site live on production URL, dark mode default, no build errors.

tasks.title: Blog — Writing Page
tasks.description: Blog index and [slug] post pages with MDX in src/content/posts/.
tasks.details: MDX pipeline, first post: "Why your medspa website is costing you clients." Syntax highlighting for code blocks.
tasks.testStrategy: Blog index lists posts, slug page renders MDX, syntax highlighting works.

tasks.title: Outreach Pipeline
tasks.description: Apify scrape, AI website grader, Clay → n8n → Ollama → Claude drafts → approval → Instantly.
tasks.details: Minneapolis medspas + dentistry scrape; grader scores LCP, mobile, trust, CTA clarity, schema; score under 70 feeds outreach; enrichment and email pipeline per PRD.
tasks.testStrategy: First batch of 20 businesses graded and in outreach queue.
